/home/runner/work/Huginn/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/opening_analyzer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/opening_analyzer.dir/demos/opening_analyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opening_analyzer.dir/src/bitboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opening_analyzer.dir/src/init.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opening_analyzer.dir/src/position.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opening_analyzer.dir/src/zobrist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opening_analyzer.dir/src/movegen_enhanced.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opening_analyzer.dir/src/attack_detection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opening_analyzer.dir/src/move.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opening_analyzer.dir/src/board120.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opening_analyzer.dir/src/chess_types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opening_analyzer.dir/src/board.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opening_analyzer.dir/src/debug.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opening_analyzer.dir/src/uci.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opening_analyzer.dir/src/uci_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opening_analyzer.dir/src/evaluation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opening_analyzer.dir/src/search.cpp.o -o bin/opening_analyzer
